name: Brie En Croute
recipeIngredient: 1 sheet Pepperidge Farm frozen Puff Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg and water together in a small bowl.
2. Thaw pastry for 20 minutes; on a floured surface roll to a 15-inch circle.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F degrees.
4. Slice Brie in half horizontally. Spread Boursin cheese on one half.
5. Re-assemble Brie and place in the center of the pastry.
6. Brush pastry edges with egg wash, and pull up sides to enclose Brie.
7. Place seam side down on an ungreased baking sheet. If desired, decorate the top with pastry scraps. Brush with egg wash.
8. Bake for 20 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes (at least) before serving.
